changeSet.author: hisab-erp
hisab-erp
hisab-erp
hisab-erp
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO permissions (id, code, resource, action, description) VALUES (uuid_generate_v4(), 'supplier:read', 'supplier', 'read', 'Read suppliers and their balances'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'supplier:write', 'supplier', 'write', 'Create/update/deactivate suppliers') ON CONFLICT (code) DO NOTHING;

changeSet.author: hisab-erp
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO role_permission (role_id, permission_id) SELECT r.id, p.id FROM roles r CROSS JOIN permissions p WHERE r.code IN ('TENANT_ADMIN', 'MANAGER', 'ACCOUNTANT', 'PAYMENT_OFFICER') AND p.code IN ('supplier:read', 'supplier:write') ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;
-- Viewer / Cashier can read suppliers (to look up info), no write. INSERT INTO role_permission (role_id, permission_id) SELECT r.id, p.id FROM roles r CROSS JOIN permissions p WHERE r.code IN ('VIEWER', 'CASHIER', 'STOCK_KEEPER') AND p.code = 'supplier:read' ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;
